phrases.intent_en: Ask where the riverside fish market is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o mercado de peixe à beira-rio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih AH BAY-ruh-REEOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Cash is preferred for fresh seafood purchases.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o mercado de peixe na marginal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fish market on the waterfront promenade.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fish market on the waterfront promenade.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o mercado de peixe na marginal.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as docas da marina de Lagos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH DOH-kuhsh DUH muh-REE-nuh DIH LAH-goosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Docks are managed by the local harbor authority.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas até às docas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh uh-TEH UHUHSH DOH-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the docks.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the docks.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh uh-TEH UHUHSH DOH-kuhsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga as placas até às docas.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as docas da marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH DOH-kuhsh DUH muh-REE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: A marina é um ponto de referência estável na Zona Ribeirinha.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga para a Marina de Lagos.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh PUH-ruh AH muh-REE-nuh DIH LAH-goosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, head to Marina de Lagos.

responses.english: Good morning, head to Marina de Lagos.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh PUH-ruh AH muh-REE-nuh DIH LAH-goosh.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga para a Marina de Lagos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the riverside fish market is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o mercado de peixe?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee FEE-kah oo mehr-KAH-doo jee PAY-shee
phrases.cultural_note: O mercado de peixe é uma referência junto à Ribeira de Bensafrim.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está junto ao cais, perto da ponte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH, PEHR-too DUH POHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's by the dock, near the bridge.

responses.english: Good morning, it's by the dock, near the bridge.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH, PEHR-too DUH POHNG-tih.
responses.local: Bom dia, está junto ao cais, perto da ponte.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o mercado de peixe à beira-rio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih AH BAY-ruh-REEOO?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o mercado de peixe na orla ribeirinha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih NUH AW-ruh-luh ree-bay-REE-nyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fish market on the riverside waterfront.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fish market on the riverside waterfront.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih NUH AW-ruh-luh ree-bay-REE-nyuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o mercado de peixe na orla ribeirinha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waterfront path starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa o caminho à beira-rio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AW kuh-MEE-nyoo AH BAY-ruh-REEOO?
phrases.cultural_note: The promenade is fully accessible for wheelchairs and strollers.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o passeio à beira-rio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO AH BAY-ruh-REEOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the waterfront promenade.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the waterfront promenade.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO AH BAY-ruh-REEOO.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o passeio à beira-rio.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a doca da marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH DAW-kuh DUH muh-REE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as docas da marina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH DOH-kuhsh DUH muh-REE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the marina docks.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the marina docks.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH DOH-kuhsh DUH muh-REE-nuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as docas da marina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fort entrance is
phrases.text_local: Qual é o caminho para a entrada da fortaleza?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH foo-ruh-tuh-LEH-zuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The fort gate is a historic checkpoint with daily opening hours.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga a marginal até ao forte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL uh-TEH OW FAW-ruh-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the waterfront road to the fort.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the waterfront road to the fort.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL uh-TEH OW FAW-ruh-tih.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga a marginal até ao forte.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a doca da marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH DAW-kuh DUH muh-REE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a doca da marina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH DAW-kuh DUH muh-REE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the marina docks.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the marina docks.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waterfront path starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa o passeio junto ao rio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AW puh-SAYOO ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO?
phrases.cultural_note: O passeio ribeirinho é contínuo ao longo da Zona Ribeirinha.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o passeio junto ao rio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the waterfront path.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the waterfront path.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO ZHOONNG-too OW REEOO.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the riverside fish market is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o mercado de peixe ribeirinho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih ree-bay-REE-nyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Local vendors prefer direct questions; queues form early morning.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o mercado de peixe ou pergunte ao guia turístico local.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fish market or ask the local tourist guide.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fish market or ask the local tourist guide.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o mercado de peixe ou pergunte ao guia turístico local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waterfront path is

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW kuh-MEE-nyoo AH BAY-ruh-REEOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Paths are paved but can be slippery after rain.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o passeio ribeirinho.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO ree-bay-REE-nyoo.
